A

ACE - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank
Ace (value 14, highest)
addCard(Card) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Adds a single card to this hand.
addCards(List<Card>) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Adds multiple cards to this hand.
addScore(String, int) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Adds points to a player's score.

C

calculateScores(Game) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Calculates and awards scores for a completed round.
card - Variable in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick.CardPlay
The card that was played
Card - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents a standard playing card with a suit and rank.
Card(Card.Suit, Card.Rank) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card
Constructs a new Card with the specified suit and rank.
Card.Rank - Enum Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Enumeration of card ranks from TWO (lowest) to ACE (highest).
Card.Suit - Enum Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Enumeration of the four card suits.
CardPlay(String, Card) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick.CardPlay
Constructs a new card play.
cardsRemaining() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Returns the number of cards remaining in the deck.
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Suit
Clubs suit (♣)
com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine - package com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine
 
com.dalegames.highlowjack.model - package com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
 

D

deal() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Deals (removes and returns) one card from the top of the deck.
dealCards() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Deals cards to all players and starts the game.
dealHand(int) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Deals multiple cards from the deck.
Deck - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents a standard 52-card deck.
Deck() - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Constructs a new deck containing all 52 standard playing cards.
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Suit
Diamonds suit (♦)

E

EIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank
Rank 8 (value 8)
equals(Object) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card
Compares this card to another object for equality.

F

findGameWinner(List<Trick>) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Finds the player who won the most game points from captured cards.
findHighTrump(List<Trick>, Card.Suit) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Finds the player who was dealt the highest trump card.
findJackWinner(List<Trick>, Card.Suit) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Finds the player who captured the Jack of trumps.
findLowTrump(List<Trick>, Card.Suit) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Finds the player who was dealt the lowest trump card.
FIVE - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank
Rank 5 (value 5)
FOUR - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank
Rank 4 (value 4)

G

Game - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents the complete state of a High Low Jack game.
Game(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Convenience constructor for 4 individual player names.
Game(List<String>) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Constructs a new game with the specified player names.
GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game.GameState
A player has reached winning score
Game.GameState - Enum Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Enumeration of possible game states.
GameEngine - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine
Game engine for High Low Jack scoring and validation.
GameEngine() - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
 
getCards() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Returns a copy of the current cards in the deck.
getCards() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns a copy of the cards in this hand.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the name of the current player whose turn it is.
getCurrentTrick() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the current trick being played, or null if between tricks.
getGamePoints(Card) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Returns the game point value for a card.
getHand(String) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the hand for the specified player.
getLeadSuit() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns the lead suit (suit of the first card played).
getPlayerName() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns the name of the player who owns this hand.
getPlayerNames() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns all player names in turn order.
getPlays() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns a copy of the plays in this trick.
getRank() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card
Returns the rank of this card.
getScore(String) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the score for a specific player.
getScores() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns a copy of the current scores map.
getState() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the current game state.
getSuit() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card
Returns the suit of this card.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Suit
Returns the Unicode symbol for this suit.
getTricks() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns all completed tricks in the order they were played.
getTrumpSuit() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the current trump suit, or null if not yet determined.
getTrumpSuit() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns the trump suit for this trick.
getValue() - Method in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank
Returns the numeric value of this rank for comparison purposes.
getWinner() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns the winner of the game, or null if game is not over.
getWinner() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Determines and returns the name of the player who won this trick.

H

Hand - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents a player's hand of cards in the game.
Hand(String) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Constructs a new empty hand for the specified player.
hasCard(Card) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns whether this hand contains the specified card.
hashCode() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card
Returns a hash code for this card.
hasSuit(Card.Suit) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns whether this hand contains any cards of the specified suit.
HEARTS - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Suit
Hearts suit (♥)

I

IN_PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game.GameState
Cards dealt and game in progress
isComplete() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns whether this trick is complete (4 cards played).
isEmpty() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Deck
Returns whether the deck is empty.
isEmpty() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns whether this hand is empty.
isGameOver() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Returns whether the game is over (a player has reached winning score).
isValidPlay(Game, String, Card) - Static method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
Validates whether a card play is legal according to High Low Jack rules.

JACK - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank

KING - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank

P

playCard(int) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Plays (removes and returns) the card at the specified index.
playCard(Card) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game
Plays a card for the current player.
playCard(Card) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Plays (removes and returns) the specified card from this hand.
playCard(String, Card) - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Plays a card in this trick for the specified player.
playerName - Variable in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick.CardPlay
The name of the player who played this card

Q

QUEEN - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Rank

R

ROUND_COMPLETE - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game.GameState

size() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns the number of cards in this hand.
size() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns the number of cards played so far.
SPADES - Enum constant in enum class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card.Suit

toString() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Card

toString() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Game

toString() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Hand
Returns a string representation of this hand.
toString() - Method in class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Returns a string representation of this trick.
Trick - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents one trick (round) in the game where each of 4 players plays one card.
Trick(Card.Suit) - Constructor for class com.dalegames.highlowjack.model.Trick
Constructs a new empty trick with the specified trump suit.
Trick.CardPlay - Class in com.dalegames.highlowjack.model
Represents one card played by a player in a trick.
